answer: Works with original-language variants: (1) Andreas by Cynewulf (Old English) - 1 original variant; (2) Bang-E-Dara Part 1 by Allama Iqbal (Urdu) - 44 original variants; (3) Nouveau traité d'économie: VOL I by Charles Dunoyer (French) - 13 original variants; (4) Zurückforderung der Denkfreiheit von den Fürsten Europens by Johann Gottlieb Fichte (German) - 2 original variants.

tool_calls.description: Retrieved list of 38 available works with basic metadata
